Here is information about a user and a new Digital Music "James Brown Live At The Apollo, 1962" being recommended to the user. For the user, we have the user's review history. For the new item being recommended, we have the item review history by other users.

### User Review History ###

3. Soul 69

Positive Aspects: Features Bird, Diz, Monk, Buddy Rich, Fantastic to listen to

5. Burglar
Positive Aspects: Amazing guitar player, light, breezy style of singing, produced by Eric Clapton

User Preference Elements: Seminal recordings, preference for King or Shelter label recordings

6. Getz / Gilberto
Positive Aspects: Best selling Bossa Nova album, Masters at the top of their game, Great vocals by Astrud Gilberto, Relaxing music, Every song is great
